chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.D-327 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For hearing of CMA No.300/24 2. For hearing of CMA No.301/24 12.05.2025 Mr. Abdul Haseeb Qazi, advocate for respondents No.1. ---- None present for the appellant. No intimation is received. On the last date of hearing no one was present on behalf of the appellant. Accordingly, the listed applications are dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
